authority.department: Labour Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Madhya Pradesh.

rules.title: Review Madhya Pradesh Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Madhya Pradesh Shops and Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Madhya Pradesh Shops and Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under Madhya Pradesh labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under Madhya Pradesh labour laws.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Madhya Pradesh provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Madhya Pradesh Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, deduction and return filing obligations apply in Madhya Pradesh.

citations.reference: Madhya Pradesh Vritti Kar Adhiniyam (Professional Tax)

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Madhya Pradesh Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

citations.reference: Madhya Pradesh Labour Welfare Fund legislation

rules.title: Review State Labour Notifications
rules.description: Monitor labour department notifications, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of Madhya Pradesh.

citations.reference: Government of Madhya Pradesh Labour Notifications

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, payroll compliance, labour welfare and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, licence renewals, inspections and labour compliance due dates.
